# Shredded Variant Parquet Fixtures from [parquet-testing](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing)

This directory contains shredded variant Parquet test fixtures from the
[parquet-testing repository](https://github.com/apache/parquet-testing/tree/master/shredded_variant),
vendored here to verify that iceberg-go reads Java-produced shredded variant
columns correctly. Cases were chosen to cover distinct code paths: top-level
primitive shredding, flat shredded objects, nested shredded objects, and
partially-shredded objects (typed_value + residual value merge).

| File pair | Case | Test name | Variant value |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `case-004` | 4 | `testShreddedVariantPrimitives` | `BOOLEAN_TRUE` (true) |
| `case-006` | 6 | `testShreddedVariantPrimitives` | `INT8` (34) |
| `case-012` | 12 | `testShreddedVariantPrimitives` | `INT64` (9876543210) |
| `case-046` | 46 | `testShreddedObject` | `{a: null, b: ""}` |
| `case-044` | 44 | `testShreddedObjectWithinShreddedObject` | `{c: {a: 34, b: "iceberg"}, d: -0.0}` |
| `case-134` | 134 | `testPartiallyShreddedObject` | `{a: null, b: "iceberg", d: DATE(2024-01-30)}` |

## Variant `.bin` encoding

Each `*.variant.bin` file is the variant metadata bytes immediately
followed by the variant value bytes (no length prefix). The `readVariantBin`
test helper parses the metadata header to find the split point before
constructing a `variant.Value`.
